system.description:
When you **_set a community to work on improvements_**, to secure new resources, or to make major repairs, spend whatever the GM says is required (time, materiel, Surplus, etc.) and roll +Population: **on a 10+**, the job gets done; **on a 7-9**, pick 1:

- It gets done, but other work doesn't; reduce Fortunes by 1
- It gets done, but the work is shoddy, crude
- It gets done, but there's a consequence (bad blood, an injury, a threat unearthed, etc.)
- There's an unforseen cost, requirement, or challenge; address it and the job gets done

partial.value:
